themes.name: Classique Spotify
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Le thème vert iconique original de Spotify.

themes.name: Rouge SpotiMeoww
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Le thème rouge vif par défaut de SpotiMeoww.

themes.name: Dracula
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème sombre avec des accents roses et violets inspiré par le fameux thème Dracula.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #282a36 !important; } .Root__nav-bar { background: #1e1f29 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(40, 42, 54, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255, 121, 198, 0.3) !important; } span, div, h1, h2, h3 { color: #f8f8f2 !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #6272a4 !important; } div[data-testid=tracklist-row]:active { background: rgba(98, 114, 164, 0.3) !important; }

themes.name: Cyberpunk Neon
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Plongez dans le futur avec ce thème Cyberpunk jaune néon et cyan foncé.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #0b0c10 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(11, 12, 16, 0.95) !important; border: 1px solid #00f0ff !important; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); } button[data-testid=play-button] { background-color: #fcee0a !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] * { fill: #000 !important; } span, h1, h2 { color: #00f0ff !important; text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,240,255,0.5) !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #c5c6c7 !important; }

themes.name: Discord Blurple
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème relaxant utilisant les couleurs de Discord.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #36393f !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(47, 49, 54, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) !important; } .Root__nav-bar { background: #2f3136 !important; } span, div, h1, h2 { color: #dcddde !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #8e9297 !important; } form[role=search] input { background-color: #202225 !important; border: none !important; }

themes.name: Sakura Pink
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème doux et rose inspiré des cerisiers en fleurs (Sakura).
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #2a1b21 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(42, 27, 33, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255,183,197,0.3) !important; } span, div, h1, h2, h3 { color: #ffe6eb !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #ffb7c5 !important; }

themes.name: Aero Glass (Blur)
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Un thème ultra moderne avec des effets de transparence et de flou givré (Glassmorphism).
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3c72 0%, #2a5298 100%) !important; } .Root__nav-bar, aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(20px) !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) !important; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) !important; } div[data-testid=tracklist-row]:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) !important; border-radius: 10px; } span, div, h1, h2 { color: #fff !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #d1d1d1 !important; }

themes.name: Synthwave 80s
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Retour dans les années 80 avec ce thème néon rose et bleu avec des ombres portées intenses.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #20003b, #000000) !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85) !important; border-top: 2px solid #ff007f !important; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,0,127,0.5); } span, h1, h2, h3 { color: #00ffff !important; text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,255,255,0.7); } img[data-testid=cover-art-image] { border: 2px solid #ff007f; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,0,127,0.6); } button[data-testid=play-button] { background: #ff007f !important; box-shadow: 0 0 15px #ff007f; } button[data-testid=play-button] * { fill: #000 !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #ffb3d9 !important; text-shadow: none; }

themes.name: Apple Music (Radical)
themes.author: SpotiMeoww
themes.desc: Une refonte TOTALE de l'interface : fond noir OLED, barre de navigation en bas façon iOS, Now Playing flottant et effets translucides (Glassmorphism).
themes.css: :root { --background-base: #000000 !important; --background-highlight: #1c1c1e !important; --text-base: #ffffff !important; --essential-base: #fa233b !important; } body, html { background-color: #000000 !important; } div[data-testid=root], div[data-overlayscrollbars-viewport], #main-view { background-color: #000000 !important; } #global-nav-bar { position: fixed !important; bottom: 0 !important; top: auto !important; width: 100% !important; z-index: 100000 !important; display: flex !important; justify-content: space-around !important; align-items: center !important; background: rgba(28,28,30,0.85) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(25px) !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(25px) !important; border-top: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) !important; padding: 10px 0 calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) 0 !important; height: auto !important; } #global-nav-bar > div { flex: 1 !important; display: flex !important; justify-content: center !important; } aside[data-testid="now-playing-bar"], footer, div[class*="now-playing"], div[class*="MiniPlayer"] { position: fixed !important; bottom: 80px !important; width: calc(100% - 20px) !important; left: 10px !important; z-index: 99999 !important; background: rgba(28,28,30,0.8) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(25px) !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(25px) !important; border-radius: 20px !important; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05) !important; overflow: hidden !important; } [data-overlayscrollbars-viewport], .Root__main-view { padding-bottom: 170px !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] { background-color: #fa233b !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] * { fill: #fff !important; } h1, h2 { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 800 !important; letter-spacing: -0.5px !important; } div[data-testid=card-click-handler], section > div { background: transparent !important; } #main-view img, section img { border-radius: 12px !important; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4) !important; }

themes.name: Dribbblish Mint
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Thème inspiré du screenshot : gris sombre et accents menthe intenses.
themes.css: :root { --background-base: #1e2124 !important; --background-highlight: #282b30 !important; --background-elevated-base: #282b30 !important; --text-base: #ffffff !important; --text-subdued: #b9bbbe !important; --essential-base: #00e676 !important; } body, html, #main-view { background-color: var(--background-base) !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar], .Root__nav-bar { background-color: var(--background-highlight) !important; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } a[aria-current=page] { background-color: #00e676 !important; border-radius: 8px !important; } a[aria-current=page] * { color: #000 !important; fill: #000 !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] { background-color: #00e676 !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] * { fill: #000 !important; }

extensions.name: Glow sur les Paroles
extensions.author: Community
extensions.desc: Ajoute un effet de brillance dynamique sur les paroles lorsqu'elles défilent.
extensions.js: let s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='div[data-testid=lyrics-fullscreen-container] span.lyrics-line-active { text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--theme-color), 0 0 20px var(--theme-color); transition: text-shadow 0.3s ease; }';document.head.appendChild(s);

extensions.name: Pochettes Circulaires
extensions.author: Miaou
extensions.desc: Transforme toutes les pochettes d'albums en cercles.

extensions.name: Cartes Style 'Browse'
extensions.author: Miaou
extensions.desc: Transforme les cartes d'albums en gros carrés colorés avec l'image inclinée, comme sur la page de recherche !
extensions.js: setInterval(()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('div[data-testid=card-click-handler]:not(.browse-styled), section[data-testid=component-shelf] > div > div:not(.browse-styled)').forEach((c,i)=>{ c.classList.add('browse-styled'); const colors=['#27856a','#1e3264','#8d67ab','#e8115b','#e13300','#1db954','#148a08','#8400e7']; c.style.backgroundColor=colors[i%colors.length]; c.style.borderRadius='8px'; c.style.padding='16px'; c.style.height='180px'; c.style.minWidth='150px'; c.style.position='relative'; c.style.overflow='hidden'; let title=c.querySelector('div, span'); if(title) { title.style.color='#fff'; title.style.fontSize='20px'; title.style.fontWeight='bold'; title.style.position='absolute'; title.style.top='16px'; title.style.left='16px'; title.style.zIndex='2'; } let img=c.querySelector('img'); if(img){ let p=img.parentElement; p.style.position='absolute'; p.style.bottom='-15px'; p.style.right='-20px'; p.style.width='90px'; p.style.height='90px'; p.style.transform='rotate(25deg)'; p.style.boxShadow='0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; } }); }, 1500);
